title: Skill Reminder News and Invocation Log — discoverability system
desc: Three-layer skill discoverability: (A) on-error hint: related skills shown on non-zero exit; (B) on-success tip: unseen skills surfaced for successful commands; (C) invocation log: runtime/skill_invocations.jsonl tracks every skill read. Skill sync diff notification deferred. Components: CommandExitHelper (PrintSkillHintOnError/OnSuccess, skill_seen.jsonl), SkillCommand (AppendSkillInvocationLog, skill_invocations.jsonl).
steps: ON-ERROR HINT: PrintSkillHintOnError() in CommandExitHelper.cs fires when exit != 0 (except eye/slack/help/mcp/suggest/skill commands). Searches all skills by token coverage score >= 0.3, shows top 3 with skill read commands. GrapMode/IsPipeMode/RunningInEye suppressed.

ON-SUCCESS TIP: PrintSkillHintOnSuccess() fires on exit=0. Same token-coverage scoring but filters to skills not seen in last 24h per CWD (via skill_seen.jsonl). Shows top 2. AppendSeenSkillIds() records shown skill IDs to suppress repeats. Rotation at 500 lines.

INVOCATION LOG: AppendSkillInvocationLog() in SkillCommand.cs appends {ts, id, app, cwd} to runtime/skill_invocations.jsonl on every successful skill read. Rotates to .jsonl.1 at 500KB. Use for analytics: which skills are consulted most, session history.

DEFERRED: Skill sync diff notification (notify when HQ skills change after hot-swap) not yet implemented. Planned: Eye post-swap hook compares skill list before/after, announces new/changed skill IDs via Slack or eye tick stdout. Track in suggest-workflow.
author: claude
